blocks.text: Match preview: West Indies Select XI face Pakistan in 4 -Day Warm-up match (TEST) on Sat, 18 Jul, 2026, 7:30 pm at Brian Lara Stadium Tarouba, Trinidad. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: West Indies Select XI vs Pakistan

blocks.text: Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Rain showers · High 28°C / Low 24°C · Rain: 9.6 mm · Wind: up to 23 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
